name: est-iconography
description: Monorepo for the EST iconography package and its Jekyll catalogue.

scripts.test:figma: npm run build:iconography && npm run test:figma --workspace @est/iconography
scripts.build:catalogue: npm run build:iconography && npm run prepare:catalogue && cd catalogue && bundle exec jekyll build --destination ../_site
scripts.serve:catalogue: npm run build:iconography && npm run prepare:catalogue && cd catalogue && bundle exec jekyll serve
scripts.test: npm run validate:issue-forms && npm run validate:iconography && npm run build:iconography && npm run test:bundle --workspace @est/iconography && npm run test:figma --workspace @est/iconography && npm run test:example
